data.name: ArrayDepthTooLarge
data.value: The maximum configured depth of {0} has been exceeded. Cannot read next JSON array.

data.name: CallFlushToAvoidDataLoss
data.value: The JSON writer needs to be flushed before getting the current state. There are {0} bytes that have not been committed to the output.

data.name: CannotReadIncompleteUTF16
data.value: Cannot read incomplete UTF-16 JSON text as string with missing low surrogate.

data.name: CannotReadInvalidUTF16
data.value: Cannot read invalid UTF-16 JSON text as string. Invalid surrogate value: '{0}'.

data.name: CannotStartObjectArrayAfterPrimitiveOrClose
data.value: Cannot write the start of an object/array after a single JSON value or outside of an existing closed object/array. Current token type is '{0}'.

data.name: CannotStartObjectArrayWithoutProperty
data.value: Cannot write the start of an object or array without a property name. Current token type is '{0}'.

data.name: CannotTranscodeInvalidUtf8
data.value: Cannot transcode invalid UTF-8 JSON text to UTF-16 string.

data.name: CannotDecodeInvalidBase64
data.value: Cannot decode JSON text that is not encoded as valid Base64 to bytes.

data.name: CannotTranscodeInvalidUtf16
data.value: Cannot transcode invalid UTF-16 string to UTF-8 JSON text.

data.name: CannotEncodeInvalidUTF16
data.value: Cannot encode invalid UTF-16 text as JSON. Invalid surrogate value: '{0}'.

data.name: CannotEncodeInvalidUTF8
data.value: Cannot encode invalid UTF-8 text as JSON. Invalid input: '{0}'.

data.name: CannotWritePropertyWithinArray
data.value: Cannot write a JSON property within an array or as the first JSON token. Current token type is '{0}'.

data.name: CannotWritePropertyAfterProperty
data.value: Cannot write a JSON property name following another property name. A JSON value is missing.

data.name: CannotWriteValueAfterPrimitiveOrClose
data.value: Cannot write a JSON value after a single JSON value or outside of an existing closed object/array. Current token type is '{0}'.

data.name: CannotWriteValueWithinObject
data.value: Cannot write a JSON value within an object without a property name. Current token type is '{0}'.

data.name: DepthTooLarge
data.value: CurrentDepth ({0}) is equal to or larger than the maximum allowed depth of {1}. Cannot write the next JSON object or array.

data.name: DestinationTooShort
data.value: Destination is too short.

data.name: EmptyJsonIsInvalid
data.value: Writing an empty JSON payload (excluding comments) is invalid.

data.name: EndOfCommentNotFound
data.value: Expected end of comment, but instead reached end of data.

data.name: EndOfStringNotFound
data.value: Expected end of string, but instead reached end of data.

data.name: ExpectedEndAfterSingleJson
data.value: '{0}' is invalid after a single JSON value. Expected end of data.

data.name: ExpectedEndOfDigitNotFound
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid end of a number. Expected a delimiter.

data.name: ExpectedFalse
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid JSON literal. Expected the literal 'false'.

data.name: ExpectedJsonTokens
data.value: The input does not contain any JSON tokens. Expected the input to start with a valid JSON token, when isFinalBlock is true.

data.name: ExpectedOneCompleteToken
data.value: The input does not contain any complete JSON tokens. Expected the input to have at least one valid, complete, JSON token.

data.name: ExpectedNextDigitEValueNotFound
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid end of a number. Expected 'E' or 'e'.

data.name: ExpectedNull
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid JSON literal. Expected the literal 'null'.

data.name: ExpectedSeparatorAfterPropertyNameNotFound
data.value: '{0}' is invalid after a property name. Expected a ':'.

data.name: ExpectedStartOfPropertyNotFound
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid start of a property name. Expected a '"'.

data.name: ExpectedStartOfPropertyOrValueNotFound
data.value: Expected start of a property name or value, but instead reached end of data.

data.name: ExpectedStartOfValueNotFound
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid start of a value.

data.name: ExpectedTrue
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid JSON literal. Expected the literal 'true'.

data.name: ExpectedValueAfterPropertyNameNotFound
data.value: Expected a value, but instead reached end of data.

data.name: FailedToGetLargerSpan
data.value: The 'IBufferWriter' could not provide an output buffer that is large enough to continue writing.

data.name: FoundInvalidCharacter
data.value: '{0}' is invalid after a value. Expected either ',', '}}', or ']'.

data.name: InvalidCast
data.value: Cannot get the value of a token type '{0}' as a {1}.

data.name: InvalidCharacterAfterEscapeWithinString
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid escapable character within a JSON string. The string should be correctly escaped.

data.name: InvalidCharacterWithinString
data.value: '{0}' is invalid within a JSON string. The string should be correctly escaped.

data.name: UnsupportedEnumIdentifier
data.value: Enum type '{0}' uses unsupported identifier '{1}'. It must not be null, empty, or containing leading or trailing whitespace. Flags enums must additionally not contain commas.

data.name: InvalidEndOfJsonNonPrimitive
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid token type for the end of the JSON payload. Expected either 'EndArray' or 'EndObject'.

data.name: InvalidHexCharacterWithinString
data.value: '{0}' is not a hex digit following '\u' within a JSON string. The string should be correctly escaped.

data.name: JsonDocumentDoesNotSupportComments
data.value: Comments cannot be stored in a JsonDocument, only the Skip and Disallow comment handling modes are supported.

data.name: JsonElementHasWrongType
data.value: The requested operation requires an element of type '{0}', but the target element has type '{1}'.

data.name: JsonElementDeepEqualsInsufficientExecutionStack
data.value: Insufficient stack to continue executing 'JsonElement.DeepEquals'. This can happen either because the 'JsonElement' values are too deep or 'DeepEquals' is being called too deep in the stack.

data.name: JsonNumberExponentTooLarge
data.value: The exponent value in the specified JSON number is too large.

data.name: DefaultTypeInfoResolverImmutable
data.value: Cannot add callbacks to the 'Modifiers' property after the resolver has been used for the first time.

data.name: TypeInfoResolverChainImmutable
data.value: The specified IJsonTypeInfoResolver chain cannot be modified.

data.name: TypeInfoImmutable
data.value: This JsonTypeInfo instance is marked read-only or has already been used in serialization or deserialization.

data.name: MaxDepthMustBePositive
data.value: Max depth must be positive.

data.name: CommentHandlingMustBeValid
data.value: The JsonCommentHandling enum must be set to one of the supported values.

data.name: MismatchedObjectArray
data.value: '{0}' is invalid without a matching open.

data.name: CannotWriteEndAfterProperty
data.value: '{0}' is invalid following a property name.

data.name: ObjectDepthTooLarge
data.value: The maximum configured depth of {0} has been exceeded. Cannot read next JSON object.

data.name: PropertyNameTooLarge
data.value: The JSON property name of length {0} is too large and not supported.

data.name: FormatDecimal
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a Decimal, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatDouble
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a Double, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatInt32
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as an Int32, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatInt64
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as an Int64, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatSingle
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a Single, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatUInt32
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a UInt32, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatUInt64
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a UInt64, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: RequiredDigitNotFoundAfterDecimal
data.value: '{0}' is invalid within a number, immediately after a decimal point ('.'). Expected a digit ('0'-'9').

data.name: RequiredDigitNotFoundAfterSign
data.value: '{0}' is invalid within a number, immediately after a sign character ('+' or '-'). Expected a digit ('0'-'9').

data.name: RequiredDigitNotFoundEndOfData
data.value: Expected a digit ('0'-'9'), but instead reached end of data.

data.name: SpecialNumberValuesNotSupported
data.value: .NET number values such as positive and negative infinity cannot be written as valid JSON. To make it work when using 'JsonSerializer', consider specifying 'JsonNumberHandling.AllowNamedFloatingPointLiterals' (see https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/api/system.text.json.serialization.jsonnumberhandling).

data.name: ValueTooLarge
data.value: The JSON value of length {0} is too large and not supported.

data.name: ZeroDepthAtEnd
data.value: Expected depth to be zero at the end of the JSON payload. There is an open JSON object or array that should be closed.

data.name: DeserializeUnableToConvertValue
data.value: The JSON value could not be converted to {0}.

data.name: DeserializeWrongType
data.value: The specified type {0} must derive from the specific value's type {1}.

data.name: SerializationInvalidBufferSize
data.value: The value must be greater than zero.

data.name: BufferWriterAdvancedTooFar
data.value: Cannot advance past the end of the buffer, which has a size of {0}.

data.name: InvalidComparison
data.value: Cannot compare the value of a token type '{0}' to text.

data.name: UnsupportedFormat
data.value: The JSON value is not in a supported {0} format.

data.name: ExpectedStartOfPropertyOrValueAfterComment
data.value: '{0}' is an invalid start of a property name or value, after a comment.

data.name: TrailingCommaNotAllowedBeforeArrayEnd
data.value: The JSON array contains a trailing comma at the end which is not supported in this mode. Change the reader options.

data.name: TrailingCommaNotAllowedBeforeObjectEnd
data.value: The JSON object contains a trailing comma at the end which is not supported in this mode. Change the reader options.

data.name: SerializerOptionsReadOnly
data.value: This JsonSerializerOptions instance is read-only or has already been used in serialization or deserialization.

data.name: SerializerOptions_InvalidChainedResolver
data.value: Cannot insert the values of 'TypeInfoResolver' or 'TypeInfoResolverChain' to 'TypeInfoResolverChain'.

data.name: StreamNotWritable
data.value: Stream is not writable.

data.name: CannotWriteCommentWithEmbeddedDelimiter
data.value: Cannot write a comment value which contains the end of comment delimiter.

data.name: PropertyTypeNotNullable
data.value: The property type '{0}' does not support null values and therefore cannot be marked as nullable.

data.name: InvalidCharacterAtStartOfComment
data.value: '{0}' is invalid after '/' at the beginning of the comment. Expected either '/' or '*'.

data.name: UnexpectedEndOfDataWhileReadingComment
data.value: Unexpected end of data while reading a comment.

data.name: CannotSkip
data.value: Cannot skip tokens on partial JSON. Either get the whole payload and create a Utf8JsonReader instance where isFinalBlock is true or call TrySkip.

data.name: NotEnoughData
data.value: There is not enough data to read through the entire JSON array or object.

data.name: UnexpectedEndOfLineSeparator
data.value: Found invalid line or paragraph separator character while reading a comment.

data.name: FormatByte
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a Byte, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatInt16
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as an Int16, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatSByte
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as an SByte, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatUInt16
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a UInt16, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: InvalidLeadingZeroInNumber
data.value: Invalid leading zero before '{0}'.

data.name: BufferMaximumSizeExceeded
data.value: Cannot allocate a buffer of size {0}.

data.name: FormatInt128
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as an Int128, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatUInt128
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a UInt128, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: FormatHalf
data.value: The JSON value was expected to be formatted as a Half, and within the representable bounds.

data.name: InvalidIndentCharacter
data.value: Supported indentation characters are space and horizontal tab.

data.name: InvalidIndentSize
data.value: Indentation size must be between {0} and {1}.

data.name: PipeWriterCanceled
data.value: PipeWriter.FlushAsync was canceled.

data.name: PipeWriter_DoesNotImplementUnflushedBytes
data.value: The PipeWriter '{0}' does not implement PipeWriter.UnflushedBytes.

data.name: InvalidNewLine
data.value: New line can be only "\n" or "\r\n".

data.name: InvalidOperation_ConcurrentOperationsNotSupported
data.value: Operations that change non-concurrent collections must have exclusive access. A concurrent update was performed on this collection and corrupted its state. The collection's state is no longer correct.

data.name: InvalidOperation_EnumFailedVersion
data.value: Collection was modified after the enumerator was instantiated.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeNonNegative
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be a non-negative value.

data.name: Arg_HTCapacityOverflow
data.value: Hashtable's capacity overflowed and went negative. Check load factor, capacity and the current size of the table.

data.name: Argument_InvalidOffLen
data.value: Offset and length were out of bounds for the array or count is greater than the number of elements from index to the end of the source collection.

data.name: CannotWriteWithinString
data.value: Writing a JSON property or value before writing the final string value segment is not supported.

data.name: Arg_MustBeRune
data.value: Object must be of type Rune.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexMustBeLess
data.value: Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the size of the collection.

data.name: Argument_DestinationTooShort
data.value: Destination is too short.

data.name: Argument_CannotExtractScalar
data.value: Cannot extract a Unicode scalar value from the specified index in the input.

data.name: CannotMixEncodings
data.value: Mixing UTF encodings in a single multi-segment JSON string is not supported. The previous segment's encoding was '{0}' and the current segment's encoding is '{1}'.

data.name: TypeDoesNotHaveAConstructorWithTheRequiredSignature
data.value: The type '{0}' does not have a constructor that takes the parent document instance and parent document index.

data.name: IncompatibleEncoders
data.value: The JavascriptEncoder provided by the Utf8JsonWriter must match the JsonDocumentBuilder.

data.name: CannotChangeImmutabilityOfAnImmutableDocument
data.value: You cannot change the immutability of an already immutable document.

data.name: CannotModifyAnImmutableDocument
data.value: You cannot modify an immutable document.

data.name: CannotCreateBuilderFromMutableDocument
data.value: You cannot create a mutable copy of a mutable document. Consider calling Freeze() on the source document.

data.name: JsonPointer_Expected_Digit_After_Escape_Character_Found_End
data.value: Expected to find 0, 1 or 2 after '~' in the component, but found the end of the component.

data.name: JsonPointer_Expected_Digit_After_Escape_Character
data.value: Expected to find 0, 1 or 2 after '~' in the component.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedNumberFormat
data.value: The value was expected to be in a supported format, and within bounds for

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedMultipleOf
data.value: The value was expected to be a multiple of

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedEquals
data.value: The value was expected to be equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedNotEquals
data.value: The value was expected to be not equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedGreaterThan
data.value: The value was expected to be greater than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedGreaterThanOrEquals
data.value: The value was expected to be greater than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLessThan
data.value: The value was expected to be greater than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLessThanOrEquals
data.value: The value was expected to be less than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_IgnoredNotType
data.value: The keyword was ignored because the value was not of type

data.name: JsonSchema_IgnoredUnrecognizedFormat
data.value: The keyword was ignored because the format was not recognized.

data.name: JsonSchema_IgnoredFormatNotAsserted
data.value: The keyword was ignored because format is not asserted in this schema.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedType
data.value: The value was expected to be of type

data.name: JsonSchema_RequiredPropertyNotPresent
data.value: Required property not present

data.name: JsonSchema_RequiredPropertyPresent
data.value: Required property present

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedMoreThanOneSchema
data.value: The instance matched more than one schema.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedNoSchema
data.value: The instance matched no schema.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexMustBeLessOrEqual
data.value: Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than or equal to the size of the collection.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexCountBuffer
data.value: Index and count must refer to a location within the buffer.

data.name: Argument_IdnBadLabelSize
data.value: IDN labels must be between 1 and 63 characters long.

data.name: Argument_InvalidCharSequence
data.value: Invalid Unicode code point found at index {0}.

data.name: Argument_IdnBadNameSize
data.value: IDN names must be between 1 and {0} characters long.

data.name: Argument_IdnBadBidi
data.value: Left to right characters may not be mixed with right to left characters in IDN labels.

data.name: Argument_IdnBadPunycode
data.value: Invalid IDN encoded string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIso8601Date
data.value: Expected an ISO8601 Date string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIso8601OffsetDateTime
data.value: Expected an ISO8601 Offset DateTime string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIso8601OffsetTime
data.value: Expected an ISO8601 Offset Time string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIso8601Duration
data.value: Expected an ISO8601 Duration string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedEmail
data.value: Expected an RFC5321 Section-4.1.2 Email string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIdnEmail
data.value: Expected an RFC6531 IDN Email string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedHostname
data.value: Expected an RFC1035 hostname.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIdnHostname
data.value: Expected an RFC5890 Section-2.3.2.3 IDN hostname.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIPV4
data.value: Expected an RFC2673 IP V4 address.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIPV6
data.value: Expected an RFC2373 IP V6 address.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedUuid
data.value: Expected an RFC4122 UUID.

data.name: net_uri_NeedFreshParser
data.value: The URI parser instance passed into 'uriParser' parameter is already registered with the scheme name '{0}'.

data.name: net_uri_AlreadyRegistered
data.value: A URI scheme name '{0}' already has a registered custom parser.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedUri
data.value: Expected an absolute URI.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedUriReference
data.value: Expected a URI reference.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIri
data.value: Expected an absolute IRI.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedIriReference
data.value: Expected an IRI reference.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedUriTemplate
data.value: Expected an RFC6570 URI Template.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedJsonPointer
data.value: Expected an RFC6901 JSON Pointer.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedRelativeJsonPointer
data.value: Expected a Relative JSON Pointer. (https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/relative-json-pointer).

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedRegex
data.value: Expected a regular expression specification.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedBase64String
data.value: Expected a valid Base64-encoded string.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedJsonContent
data.value: Expected valid JSON content.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedBase64Content
data.value: Expected valid Base64-encoded JSON content.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedMatchRegularExpression
data.value: Expected the value to match the regular expression

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLengthEquals
data.value: Expected the length of the value to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLengthNotEquals
data.value: Expected the length of the value not to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLengthGreaterThan
data.value: Expected the length of the value to be greater than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLengthGreaterThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the length of the value to be greater than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLengthLessThan
data.value: Expected the length of the value to be less than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedLengthLessThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the length of the value to be less than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyCountEquals
data.value: Expected the property count to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyCountNotEquals
data.value: Expected the property count not to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyCountGreaterThan
data.value: Expected the property count to be greater than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyCountGreaterThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the property count to be greater than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyCountLessThan
data.value: Expected the property count to be less than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyCountLessThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the property count to be less than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedItemCountEquals
data.value: Expected the item count to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedItemCountNotEquals
data.value: Expected the item count not to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedItemCountGreaterThan
data.value: Expected the item count to be greater than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedItemCountGreaterThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the item count to be greater than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedItemCountLessThan
data.value: Expected the item count to be less than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedItemCountLessThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the item count to be less than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedContainsCountEquals
data.value: Expected the contains count to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedContainsCountNotEquals
data.value: Expected the contains count not to equal

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedContainsCountGreaterThan
data.value: Expected the contains count to be greater than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedContainsCountGreaterThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the contains count to be greater than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedContainsCountLessThan
data.value: Expected the contains count to be less than

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedContainsCountLessThanOrEquals
data.value: Expected the contains count to be less than or equal to

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedStringEquals
data.value: Expected the value to be the string

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedConstantValue
data.value: Expected the value to be

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedNullValue
data.value: Expected the value to be 'null'

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedBooleanTrueValue
data.value: Expected the value to be 'true'

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedBooleanFalseValue
data.value: Expected the value to be 'false'

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedAllSchema
data.value: The value matched all subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_DidNotMatchAllSchema
data.value: The value did not match all subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedAtLeastOneSchema
data.value: The value matched at least one subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedExactlyOneSchema
data.value: The value matched exactly one subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_DidNotMatchAtLeastOneSchema
data.value: The value did not match at least one subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedAtLeastOneConstantValue
data.value: The value matched at least one subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_DidNotMatchAtLeastOneConstantValue
data.value: The value did not match at least one subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_DidNotMatchNotSchema
data.value: The value did not match the subschema in a not composition, which means the evaluation was a match.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedNotSchema
data.value: The value matched the subschema in a not composition, which means the evaluation was not a match.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedIfForThen
data.value: The value matched the subschema in a binary or ternay if, which means the evaluation will go on to match the then subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedThen
data.value: The value matched the then subschema corresponding to a binary or ternary if.

data.name: JsonSchema_DidNotMatchThen
data.value: The value did not match the then subschema corresponding to a binary or ternary if.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedIfForElse
data.value: The value did not match the subschema in a ternary if, which means the evaluation will go on to match the else subschema.

data.name: JsonSchema_MatchedElse
data.value: The value matched the else subschema corresponding to a ternary if.

data.name: JsonSchema_DidNotMatchElse
data.value: The value did not match the else subschema corresponding to a ternay if.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedMatchPatternPropertySchema
data.value: The value of the property did not match the corresponding subschema when its name matched the regular expression

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyNameMatchesRegularExpression
data.value: The property name did not match the regular expression

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyNameMatchesSchema
data.value: The property name did not match the schema.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedPropertyMatchesFallbackSchema
data.value: The value of the property did not match the fallback schema.

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedMatchesDependentSchema
data.value: The value did match the schema applied because it contained the property

data.name: JsonSchema_ExpectedUniqueItems
data.value: The array was expected to contain unique items.

data.name: JsonSchema_EvaluatedSubschema
data.value: The value was expected to match the subschema.

data.name: InvalidJsonReference
data.value: The value is not a valid JSON reference.

data.name: PrefixTupleMustBeCreatedFirst
data.value: The prefix tuple must be added first.

data.name: IncorrectArrayBufferLength
data.value: Expected an array buffer length of '{0}'.

data.name: PrecisionMustBeBetween0And255
data.value: Precision must be between 0 and 255.

data.name: CannotSetRequiredPropertyToUndefined
data.value: Cannot set the required property '{0}' to an undefined value.
